system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3_getall","body":"CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_DONGGOI_HISTORY3_GETALL]
(
  @masp nvarchar(200),
  @ngaythang date
)
AS
--DECLARE @masp nvarchar(200)
--DECLARE @ngaythang date

UPDATE tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3
SET actions_type = 'D'
WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang
  AND actions_type IS NULL

DECLARE @mact nvarchar(50)
DECLARE @soluong float
DECLARE @cbm float
DECLARE @IsPacking bit
DECLARE @ghichu nvarchar(200)
DECLARE @ngaysua datetime
DECLARE @nguoisua nvarchar(50)
DECLARE @id_dinhmuc nvarchar(50)

DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
  SELECT madonggoi, soluong, cbm, IsPacking, ghichu, ngaysua, nguoisua, id_dinhmuc
  FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi WITH(NOLOCK)
  WHERE masp = @masp
OPEN CUR
FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @mact, @soluong, @cbm, @IsPacking, @ghichu, @ngaysua, @nguoisua, @id_dinhmuc
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
	IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3 WHERE id_dinhmuc = @id_dinhmuc AND masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang)
  BEGIN
    UPDATE tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3
    SET mact_new = @mact,
        soluong_new = @soluong,
        ispacking_new = @IsPacking,
        ghichu_new = @ghichu,
        actions_type = 'U',
        ngaysua = @ngaysua,
        nguoisua = @nguoisua
    WHERE id_dinhmuc = @id_dinhmuc AND masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang AND mact_old is not null
  END
  ELSE
  BEGIN
    INSERT INTO tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3(id, ngaythang, masp, mact_new, soluong_new, ispacking_new, ghichu_new, actions_type, ngaysua, nguoisua, id_dinhmuc)
    VALUES (newid(), @ngaythang, @masp, @mact, @soluong, @IsPacking, @ghichu, 'I', @ngaysua, @nguoisua, @id_dinhmuc)
  END


	FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @mact, @soluong, @cbm, @IsPacking, @ghichu, @ngaysua, @nguoisua, @id_dinhmuc
END
CLOSE CUR
DEALLOCATE CUR

SELECT A.*, 
  B.mota as mota_new, B.quycach as quycach_new, B.mausac as mausac_new,
  C.mota as mota_old, C.quycach as quycach_old, C.mausac as mausac_old,
  J.FullName as nguoicapnhat 
FROM
(
  SELECT *
  FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3 
  WHERE masp = @masp AND ngaythang = @ngaythang
) A
LEFT JOIN tr_material B ON A.mact_new = B.mavt
LEFT JOIN tr_material C ON A.mact_old = C.mavt
LEFT JOIN SYS_USER J on A.nguoisua = J.UserName","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.sys_user","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3","dbo.tr_material"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi_history3"],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
